2	Stefan Georgi
CHECKLIST 3 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING UPSELL PAGES
Stop/Attention Bar
Progress bar
Video prompt
explaining they need
to push play to watch
(if using video)
Congratulate them for
making a smart decision

Congratulate them for

-- 2 of 7 --

3	Stefan Georgi
CHECKLIST 3 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING UPSELL PAGES
Introduce logical extension
of the front-end offer.
Examples:
• 	DFY version of what
they just bought.
• 	More of what they
just bought.
• 	Gets the primary
result faster.
Reaffirm good purchase
decision in intro
Make them feel…
• 	Smart
• 	Safe
• 	Excited
• 	Proud
• 	Lucky
Present a new problem
they have after buying
front-end offer.
(Example: You have
the solution to fix your
credit but it’s very
time consuming.)
===
===
===
===
===
===
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 7 --

4	Stefan Georgi
CHECKLIST 3 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING UPSELL PAGES
Highlight consequences of
not resolving new problem
Highlight benefits
of new solution
Explain how the good
news is, they can get
new solution at an
exclusive discount
Introduce new offer
===
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 7 --

5	Stefan Georgi
CHECKLIST 3 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING UPSELL PAGES
Breakdown what’s
included
Summarize everything
included as bullets
to reaffirm offer
Explain why you’re
being so generous
Justify the price
of new solution
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

6	Stefan Georgi
CHECKLIST 3 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING UPSELL PAGES
Remind them about
guarantee
Remind them
of core benefits
CTA message and button
(if using video, make it
appear only near the end)
Exit pop - either offering
instant discount,
payment plan, or
reminding them of what
they’re about to give up
Decline (“no thanks” message
highlighting what they are
agreeing to miss out on)
